session.user: Run pytest on the land_learn tests and report results. Command: pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py -x -v
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command on the land_learn tests.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on land_learn tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
